HERO_TAGLINE: A good old fashioned barber shop for men
SERVICE_1_DESC: Classic cut starts with scissors, moves to electric shavers, and ends with a newly-sharpened razor
SERVICE_2_DESC: Traditional straight razor shave with trimming of mustache, sideburns, and beard included
SERVICE_3_DESC: Beard trimming and shaping with professional technique
SERVICE_4_DESC: Simple and stylish haircuts for children
SERVICE_5_DESC: Refreshing scalp wash followed by blow dry and light styling
SERVICE_6_DESC: Full haircut with straight razor shave — the classic barbershop experience in one visit
ABOUT_TEXT: To provide our guest with the highest level haircut experience. We specialize in modern and old school techniques to bring you the latest trends. A true neighbourhood barber shop with a steady stream of customers, air-conditioned with TV, serving the local community of Parañaque.
GALLERY_SUBTITLE: Classic and clean — the Oragon way.
TESTIMONIAL_1_QUOTE: Like a lot of guys, I sometimes miss the good old days when the only place to get a haircut was a barber shop. There are only two barbers at Oragon, which has a steady stream of customers all day. The place has a TV and is air-conditioned, and a basic haircut goes for P70. There is nothing classy about Oragon, but I find it the ideal neighbourhood barber shop where everybody knows everybody.
TESTIMONIAL_2_QUOTE: Lagi na lang dito para sa gupit. Mura, mabilis, at palaging malinis ang hasil. Ang barbero talaga masipag at magaling.
TESTIMONIAL_3_QUOTE: Matagal na akong customer dito. Alam na nila kung anong gusto kong gupit. Parang pamilya na ang Oragon sa 'amin sa kapitbahayan.
SEO_TITLE: Oragon Barber Shop | Barbershop in Parañaque
SEO_DESCRIPTION: Oragon Barber Shop — a good old fashioned barber shop for men in Parañaque. Classic haircuts, straight razor shaves, and beard grooming starting at ₱70.
SEO_KEYWORDS: Oragon Barber Shop, barbershop Parañaque, haircut Parañaque, barber NCR, affordable haircut
